meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Master user onboarding to solve debugging bottlenecks. A beginner guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Debugging slows down every freelancer. By implementing structured user onboarding, you capture precise user states and edge-case data before errors occur. Using Antigravity to instrument your flow and Claude Code to automate diagnostics, you transform opaque runtime crashes into actionable, context-rich logs, drastically reducing your mean time to resolution.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your terminal is screaming a cryptic error message you haven't seen before. The code works on your machine, but in the wild, it falls apart. This is the freelancer's nightmare—being stuck in an endless loop of 'can't debug code' while your reputation hangs in the balance.

But what if the solution wasn't staring at logs, but observing the user? By integrating high-fidelity onboarding, you create a digital trail that turns mystery bugs into solved tickets. We’re moving beyond simple walkthroughs; we’re building a diagnostic engine that empowers your app to report its own failures while you focus on shipping the next feature.

steps.title: Instrument the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Define the critical path of your onboarding to ensure every user interaction is logged and traceable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a state machine configuration for a user onboarding flow that tracks step completion, timestamps, and browser context for every transition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'instrument onboarding flow with state machine logging'

steps.title: Implement Context-Aware Error Hooks
steps.description: Capture the user's journey immediately before an error fires to provide the context needed to debug.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a global error handler that captures the last 5 steps of the user onboarding state and appends them to the error payload.

steps.title: Automate Log Analysis with Claude Code
steps.description: Use AI to scan your onboarding logs for common patterns that lead to user-reported crashes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script to parse onboarding logs and identify recurring sequences that precede 404 or 500 errors.

steps.title: Deploy Debug-Friendly Onboarding UI
steps.description: Expose a hidden 'debug mode' in your onboarding UI for internal testing and client-side troubleshooting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a debug overlay component that displays the current onboarding state and recent error logs when a specific key combination is pressed.

steps.title: Validate Fixes with Automated Scenarios
steps.description: Simulate the exact user path that triggered the bug to ensure your fix holds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite that simulates user onboarding sessions based on the captured error logs.

pro_tips: Always log the user's viewport size and device pixel ratio in your onboarding flow; it solves 30% of CSS-related 'bugs' instantly.
Use a unique 'correlation ID' for every onboarding session so you can stitch together logs across different microservices.
Never ship onboarding without an 'Export Logs' button in your support modal—it saves you from asking clients to 'check the console'.
Integrate feature flags into your onboarding to toggle specific validation logic without redeploying code.
Treat onboarding as a product feature, not a chore; the more data you collect during user registration, the easier your debugging becomes.
content.next_steps: After completing these steps, audit your production logs for the next 48 hours to confirm the correlation between onboarding states and reported bugs.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. With the right instrumentation, you'll spend less time debugging and more time scaling your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
